# Third-party licenses

These files are unmodified license and notice documents obtained from their official distribution sources.

- `Microsoft.WindowsAppSDK.txt`: `Microsoft.WindowsAppSDK` 2.2.0 NuGet package `license.txt`
- `CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.txt`: `CommunityToolkit.Mvvm` 8.4.2 NuGet package `License.md`
- `CommunityToolkit.Mvvm-ThirdPartyNotices.txt`: `CommunityToolkit.Mvvm` 8.4.2 NuGet package notices
- `dotnet-Windows.txt`: .NET 10 Windows distribution `LICENSE.txt`
- `dotnet-ThirdPartyNotices.txt`: .NET 10 Windows distribution notices
- `microsoft-win-dev-skills.txt`: `microsoft/win-dev-skills` MIT license at commit `c98bc78c427910838e97c70bdcd7678a0331fad3`
- `microsoft-win-dev-skills-ThirdPartyNotices.md`: notices from that same upstream commit
- `NSIS.txt`: NSIS 3.12 official `COPYING` file; applies to the generated installer runtime

The `microsoft-win-dev-skills` documents apply to the vendored development skills under `.agents/skills/winui-*`. They are not part of the VideoCutEditor application installer.
